steps.t: Anson Roper can be found in Tighfield. Adamanda North-took has asked you to collect some rope from Anson Roper.
Flax can be found growing in the farms of northern Tighfield. Anson Roper has asked you to collect flax.
Anson Roper can be found in Tighfield. You should bring the flax to Anson Roper.
Fallen wood can be found in the forests around Tighfield. Anson Roper has asked you to collect a fine piece of fallen wood.
Anson Roper can be found in Tighfield. You should bring the fine piece of wood to Anson.
The rope is next to Anson in Tighfield. You should pick up the rope.
Adamanda is near Nobottle. You should bring the rope to Adamanda.
